snippet: System wide support is essential in building a positive performance and development culture in a school. Support and resources around the Performance and Development Plan (PDP) system are available through the following Department websites: Teacher Class employees: performance and development External Link Online PDP Support and Resources External Link (staff login required) Resources include: The Australian Institute for Teaching and School Leadership (AITSL) External Link website hosts national guidelines to assist principals and schools with performance and development and professional learning, and offers a range of tools and resources including the application of standards, self-reviews and illustrations of practice. Further tools and resources to support effective professional learning can be found on the Department’s website.
